name: hakuna
title: Hakuna
description: Raycast extention for hakuna.ch. Get your personal API token from app.hakuna.ch/token.
author: fratoro

commands.name: timer
commands.title: Timer
commands.description: Start, update or stop the Hakuna timer

commands.name: time-entry
commands.title: Enter Time
commands.description: Add a new time entry or start a timer

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Hakuna Overview
commands.description: Show today's worktime and overall overview in the menu bar

commands.name: profile
commands.title: Profiles
commands.description: View your overtime and remaining vacation days

commands.name: absences
commands.title: Absences
commands.description: List your absences for the current year

commands.name: clear-cache
commands.title: Clear Cache
commands.subtitle: Hakuna
commands.description: Clears locally cached data (projects, tasks, users, etc.). Use this if data appears outdated after changes made directly in Hakuna.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
